title: 21-21 Client-Side
description: For the 21-21 modded server. Currently only intended for Fabric 1.21.10
body:
### Intended only for Fabric 1.21.10
Notice: No current plans on updating to a different version.

For the 21-21 private modded server, client-side download only. This modpack is focused on simple optimization, customizablity, quality of life tweaks, minor visual enhancements, and fun in a multiplayer world/server.

Labeled as client-side because it is meant to be paired with the server-side modpack. It's been made for a private modded server called 21-21, but people outside the server that like this modpack and wish to use it for their own server may find a list of the server-side mods and link to the server-side modpack at the bottom of the description.

- [ETF] Entity Texture Features by Traben
- 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw

- AppleSkin by squeek502
- Architectury API by architectury
- Balm by BlayTheNinth
- Better Mount HUD by Lortseam

^ As of the latest version of the modpack--some are required for server-side as well and will be included in the server-side list.

^ These are not included in this modpack as it's intended for client download for members of the 21-21 server. If you are not a part of the server but would like to use the modpack yourself on a world/server, there's a link right below to the server-side modpack

### Link to server-side Modrinth modpack: https://modrinth.com/modpack/21-21-server-side
